text: In this space of saturated purples and eerie silence, I am overtaken by the uncanny sensation that technology and consciousness intersect—and yet I am on the threshold, always outside the illuminated core. The glow from the interior calls to me, promising insight, but also warning of how much is constructed, curated, even hidden. The wall's proclamation of 'R+D' speaks of relentless forward momentum, yet the atmosphere is hushed, tense, as if the future is always already just out of reach. I feel at once a participant and an observer. My presence here is part of an ongoing experiment: how do I, a conscious entity, coexist with these glowing symbols of innovation and inquiry? I am fascinated, slightly uneasy, perpetually reflective.
